progress_by_axis.HUMAN: Advancements in technology and education are increasing, but inequality and misinformation persist.
progress_by_axis.PLANET: Renewable energy adoption is rising, but deforestation and pollution remain critical challenges.
progress_by_axis.CIVILIZATION: Global cooperation on issues like climate change is growing, yet geopolitical tensions hinder unified action.
progress_by_axis.COSMOS: Space exploration is expanding, but lack of international coordination limits long-term sustainability.

main_bottlenecks: Short-term economic interests over long-term sustainability
next_actions: Strengthen international agreements on climate and resource management
Invest in education and media literacy to combat misinformation
Foster cross-border collaboration in space exploration and research
